final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic for a Chinese ethnic minority costume, designed as a museum collection catalog plate.

Style/medium: museum exhibition panel, historical costume encyclopedia infographic, cultural heritage documentation style, archival paper texture with off-white/beige background, restrained and professional aesthetic
Composition: top-down layout with clear grid structure, central full-body figure or exploded view of costume, left side structural breakdown with leader lines, right side material/texture and color/pattern panels, bottom process flow diagram
Subject: a representative Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume (e.g., Miao, Tibetan, or Yi ethnic attire) with authentic structural details, layered garments, traditional headpiece, and accessories
Scene/backdrop: neutral archival paper background with subtle texture, no distracting elements, museum display aesthetic
Lighting/mood: even diffused museum lighting, clear visibility of all details, scholarly and dignified atmosphere
Color palette: muted archival tones—warm beige paper base, authentic costume colors as accent, black/sepia for text and diagrams
Text (verbatim): "中国少数民族服饰"
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese characters; clear and legible typography; accurate structural annotations; authentic material textures; cultural symbolism explanations; no garbled text or pinyin
Avoid: poster aesthetics, studio photography style, e-commerce product page look, anime illustration style, cosplay aesthetic, incorrect labeling, blurred text, fake materials, excessive decoration, gradients, neon colors, watermarks
